name: librosa

performance.notes: NumPy-based; real-time not possible; batch processing seconds per file

agent_readiness.notes: Standard Python library for audio and music analysis. Load audio, compute spectrograms (STFT, Mel, CQT), extract features (MFCCs, chroma, spectral centroid, tempo, beat tracking), pitch detection, onset detection. Foundation for music information retrieval (MIR) research. Extensively documented. NumPy/SciPy based. Used in music ML pipelines, audio classification, speech feature extraction.

gotchas: Audio loading requires soundfile or audioread backend
Some features approximate (beat tracking not perfect for complex music)
best_when: Music information retrieval and audio feature extraction
Feature engineering for audio ML models (MFCCs, spectrograms)
avoid_when: Real-time audio processing (use PyAudio or PortAudio)
summary: librosa is the standard Python library for audio and music analysis. Computes spectrograms (Mel, STFT, CQT), MFCCs, chroma features, tempo/beat tracking, onset detection. Foundation for music information retrieval research. Used in audio ML feature pipelines and music visualization. CPU-only, batch processing. Extensively documented and widely used in academia and industry.
